title: stachys arenaria var. angustifolia
intro: Stachys arenaria var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relieving headaches, reducing anxiety and stress, and soothing digestive issues. Narrow-leaved Betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
